subcodes.first_line: O thou who stringest the pearls of inner meanings! Render praise unto God, for the messenger of confirmation hath arrived in swift succession, and journeys to diverse regions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظم لئالی معانی حمد کن خدا را که پیک تایید پیاپی رسید و سفر بسائر جهات
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort
